calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-18-2026 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-18-2026 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Kit Tam aka Kit Fu Tam

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter;

Matter not reported.

Plaintiff American Express National Bank is present represented by Jonathan Vaknin, Esq.
Defendant Kit Tam aka Kit Fu Tam not appearinc

The court reviews the Trial Brief filed April 23, 2026.

The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff American Express National Bank, and against Defendant Kit Tam aka Kit Fu Tam.

Plaintiff American Express National Bank is awarded judgment against Defendant Kit Tam aka Kit Fu Tam as follows:

Damages/Principal: $28,608.93
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Costs: $450.00

Total Judgment: $29,058.93

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.
Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2025 Set For Trial On May-18-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
